description: 10 test queries for retrieval accuracy validation of the maths-grade6-caps-fractions-v0.1 content pack. Each query simulates a real Grade 6 learner question. Expected chunk IDs are ground-truth top-3 hits against the 10-chunk fractions pack.

queries.question: What is a fraction and what do the top and bottom numbers mean?
What is the difference between a proper fraction, an improper fraction, and a mixed number?
How do I make equivalent fractions?
How do I simplify 18/24 to its lowest terms using the highest common factor?
How do I tell which fraction is bigger: 3/4 or 5/6?
How do I add fractions that have the same denominator?
How do I add 2/5 and 1/3 together when the denominators are different?
How do I subtract fractions when the denominators are different?
Thandi has R80 and she spends 3/4 of it. How much money did she spend?
Sipho has 24 sweets and gives 1/3 to his sister and 1/4 to his brother. How many sweets does he have left?
